clean_body: Hello, Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office. “Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News. Well, the first tracker of the campaign has begun showing up to my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.” Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority. And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley! I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $7,500 before midnight tonight if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $2,039 short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m running for Senate because I care about the people of Iowa. I want to help Iowans achieve their potential and make our state a leader again in manufacturing, education, and clean energy. And I believe I’ve got the experience to get the job done. But the only way I can get that message out and correct the lies they’re going to tell about me is with your donation now to my campaign. Thank you for being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Mario DeSantis
subject: New Year Campaign Kickoff!
body:
Potluck & Politics!

[image: image.png]

Set those ovens! Ask grandma for her best recipe!

We're having a Potluck & Politics meeting to start the New Year.

We've made some exciting advancements in the past month and I can't wait to
share! This meeting is to kick the campaign into full-steam and share our
agenda through June. Come hang out, have some fun, and see what you can do
to make sure our progressive values are represented in Congress. It's all
about the roles & goals, people!

For those more comfortable joining us online, there's an online
registration option as well. Head on over to DeSantisForCongress.com to
register. See you next week!

*in-person registration capped at 20

Come hang out, have some fun, and see what you can do to make sure our progressive values are represented in Congress. It's all about the roles & goals, people! For those more comfortable joining us online, there's an online registration option as well. Head on over to DeSantisForCongress.com to register. See you next week! *in-person registration capped at 20

body:
You’ve powered our work for a stronger New Mexico. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40310161/323772173/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20220102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjU5NWUxMS0zMTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RjiQ0UkeGNVaLfKs02wOpc4rU0jjdGH5HuO8JFTfGOk=&emci=23df31f1-2c6c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=76595e11-316c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=252045)

Thank you, folks. You’ve helped us reach our campaign’s fundraising goals month after month. **And you’ve powered our work for a stronger New Mexico.** In the year ahead we have the opportunity to build on all we’ve accomplished with a Democratic majority. We have the chance to further groundbreaking legislation to electrify America’s homes and businesses as our Electrification Caucus grows in momentum. We can make sure New Mexico’s early childhood education programs get the consistent, dedicated funding they need to give our littlest kids a fair shot. We can pass the _College Completion Fund Act_ , to help the next generation of leaders close the gap as they work hard to get their degree. We can pass the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ , to recover at-risk species and conserve their habitats at the scale needed. And, together, we can make sure we hit the mark when it comes to curbing emissions and taking on climate change. The coming year will bring serious and consequential elections here in New Mexico and across the country. Our campaign team will be hard at work getting out the vote for strong Democrats, from battleground Senate races to state and local offices — all thanks to your support. Together we can accomplish anything. Thank you again for believing in a stronger New Mexico and country. — Martin | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40310162/323772174/1676867678?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20220102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjU5NWUxMS0zMTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RjiQ0UkeGNVaLfKs02wOpc4rU0jjdGH5HuO8JFTfGOk=)

body:
You need to read this before it’s too late
Fellow American - This is URGENT

The DNC has a new strategy, and it could really hurt us if our counter campaign isn’t successful.

We MUST start letting their voters know about their disastrous records NOW. That’s where you come in Peter. We need your immediate contribution to keep this fund filled so we never have to come down. There is absolutely NO TIME TO WASTE because the longer we wait to hit them, the more entrenched they’ll become. That’s right Peter, if we can’t secure enough money this week to run our campaigns; they win, and we lose. We’re taking this week by week. One ad at a time. name: =?utf-8?Q?Abel=20Mulugheta?=
subject: Happy New Year! Now let's get to work.
body:
We are less than 60 days away from Election Day. It's time to hit the streets. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/abelfortexas.com/happy-new-year-now-lets-get-to-work-8700761?e=2dc92facb0)
---
[](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=e1886221b2&e=2dc92facb0)
Happy New Year!

I’ve always enjoyed this season because it provides ample opportunity to create memories with my family and friends, so I hope that you are also taking time to relax and enjoy the company of your loved ones. We all deserve it after this past year.

I won’t be able to relax for long though, because believe it or not, we are less than 60 days away from Election Day (March 1st), and just 43 days away from the start of early voting (February 14th-25th).

I’m going to spend the next 60 days working to ensure that everyone in District 30 knows about our campaign’s plans to level the playing field for everyday Americans who deserve to live a life full of dignity, prosperity, and equity, but are too often left behind.

We have a lot planned. I’m excited to share with you what our campaign is going to be doing in the new year and ways you can support us.

First, this upcoming weekend—Saturday, January 8th & Sunday, January 9th— we will launch our canvassing program. On Saturday, we will have 2 different shifts (morning & afternoon); on Sunday, we will only have an afternoon shift.

Just bring your walking shoes and a smile. Food and beverages will be provided!
[](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=2566234705&e=2dc92facb0)
We’re running a grassroots campaign and will need to reach tens of thousands of homes if we want to win in March. Please sign up to knock on doors on Saturday and/or Sunday and spread the word about our campaign’s message to your neighbors.
| [SIGN UP TO BLOCK WALK](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=ec7424549a&e=2dc92facb0)
---
Next, soon we will be sharing how much we raised before our 2021 end-of-year (EOY) fundraising deadline. I cannot thank our contributors enough for chipping in and supporting our campaign. I was truly humbled by the outpouring of support. So please be on the look out for an email with our Q4/EOY fundraising totals.

Finally, it’s important that with just over 40 days until voting starts that we not take our foot off the gas and continue running full speed ahead. That’s why I’m asking if you can make a contribution to help us kick off the new year.
| [DONATE $100](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=c746f3b8fd&e=2dc92facb0)
---
| [DONATE $50](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=0f8c8c62bc&e=2dc92facb0)
---
| [DONATE $30 ](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=9004503320&e=2dc92facb0)
---
| [DONATE $20](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=86399ff196&e=2dc92facb0)
---
In a 9 person race, the candidate with the most resources will have the ability to reach more voters throughout District 30—leading to victory. Sustaining the momentum we built in the last quarter of 2021 is crucial to win this race.

Again, I’m so grateful to have you on our team and I know that together there’s nothing we can’t accomplish. Your support is what gives me the energy and confidence to run this campaign.

Wishing you health and safety this new year.

Your friend,
| | | | [](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=a1a3e9a8fe&e=2dc92facb0)| [](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=52de0f593e&e=2dc92facb0)| [](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=2cef8d79ff&e=2dc92facb0)
---|---|---
| | | [](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=1d9f7015d5&e=2dc92facb0)
